identity.name: JT-Zero Ground Station
identity.mission: Provide a professional, high-performance, dark-mode engineering dashboard for monitoring and controlling the JT-Zero drone autonomy system.
identity.aesthetic: Orbital Command / Cyberpunk Terminal / Glass Cockpit
identity.tone: Precision, Stability, Technical Authority, Hard Sci-Fi

layout_strategy.grid_system: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-2 p-2 h-screen overflow-hidden

bento_grid.sidebar: col-span-12 md:col-span-2 row-span-full border-r border-[#1E293B] bg-[#0A0C10] p-4 flex flex-col gap-4
bento_grid.main_view: col-span-12 md:col-span-7 row-span-full flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-y-auto
bento_grid.status_panel: col-span-12 md:col-span-3 row-span-full border-l border-[#1E293B] bg-[#0A0C10] flex flex-col gap-2

layout_strategy.panel_style: relative bg-[#0A0C10]/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-[#1E293B] p-4 flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-hidden group hover:border-[#00F0FF]/30 transition-colors duration-300

TelemetryRow.description: A single row of key-value pair for sensor data.
TelemetryRow.structure: {label}{value}

StatusBadge.description: Indicator for system health (IMU, GPS, etc).
StatusBadge.structure: {label}

TerminalLog.structure:
{logs.map((log, i) =>
[{log.timestamp}] {log.message}
)}

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 1px, #000 1px, #000 2px); opacity: 0.1; pointer-events: none; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 10;
visual_enhancers.corner_brackets: absolute w-2 h-2 border-t border-l border-[#00F0FF] top-0 left-0 opacity-50 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

universal_guidelines: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all text elements to maintain the engineering aesthetic.
Ensure all numeric data uses 'tabular-nums' to prevent layout shifts during rapid updates.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds; use solid dark colors (#050505, #0A0C10) to maximize contrast.
Use Cyan (#00F0FF) for normal values, Amber (#F59E0B) for warnings, and Red (#EF4444) for errors.
Implement a 'Heartbeat' indicator in the top bar to show system liveness.
Use CSS Grid for the main layout to create a rigid, dashboard-like structure.
Avoid rounded corners greater than 'rounded-sm' or use 'rounded-none' for a sharp, technical look.
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid' attribute.
Use 'recharts' for data visualization with minimal styling (hide axes lines if possible, focus on the data curve).
The 'Terminal' section should always auto-scroll to the bottom on new logs.
